summary: Implemented debug HUD (US-014): Added QualityBand type to domain types, created deriveQualityBand() pure function with threshold-based classification, created createDebugHud() with toggle/update/dispose interface rendering latency/jitter/quality band/scene params as a <pre> overlay, created createKeyboardToggle() for backtick key binding, and wired everything into main.ts with initial snapshot seeding. All quality gates pass: lint, typecheck, 303 unit tests, 47 e2e tests.
